## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore

## Validation

List commands you ran and key outcomes.

```bash
npm pack --dry-run
```

Additional checks (if runtime behavior changed):

- [ ] `npm run policy:example`
- [ ] `npm run policy:consolidate-validate:example`
- [ ] `npm run policy:mem-core:load -- --format markdown`

## Security / Portability Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or private endpoints committed
- [ ] No absolute local paths or personal machine names
- [ ] New config is environment-driven where appropriate
- [ ] Generated/private artifacts are not committed

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] QUICKSTART updated (if needed)
- [ ] Architecture docs updated (if needed)

## Risks and Rollback

Describe risk level and how to roll back if needed.
